tagline: INSERT REPLACE USING and INSERT REPLACE ON are now generally available for Databricks Runtime 17.2.
what_it_does: INSERT REPLACE USING and INSERT REPLACE ON are now generally available for Databricks Runtime 17.2. For details, see the Databricks Runtime 17.2 release notes.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: INSERT REPLACE USING and INSERT REPLACE ON are now generally available for Databricks Runtime 17.2. For details, see the Databricks Runtime 17.2 release notes.
